module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt/step orchestration and the new plan queue module. lib.rs exposes plan and re-exports PlanError, PlanQueue, and PlanRecord; task runtime state uses PlanQueue for plan storage so follow-up plans are gated until every stored step signature for a plan completes.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. DeepseekBackend loads its config and issues streaming Deepseek chat-completions requests with a provider-supported user-role single-message payload preserving request.prompt as content.

childModules.name: plan
childModules.purpose: Owns PlanQueue, PlanRecord, and PlanError for insertion-ordered task plan storage, lookup, and completion tracking.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Defines the agent prompt interface, render_template conditional/variable rendering, and InitialPrompt variables for System, Context, NoPreviewTask, and Tools.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup/routing behavior, the local task event worker/channel, total route_session_event dispatch policy, SessionContext storage for host System metadata, task previews, and tool previews, and task creation that forwards an already-empty TaskSignature plus the separate original request string into Task.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns the top-level agent runtime Step type re-exported by lib.rs and consumed by task runtime state and step execution helpers.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns task runtime state and step routing. TaskState stores PlanQueue-backed plan_queue, add_plan inserts generated StepSignatures into the queue, run_plan reads queued signatures, and route_step_event only parses/starts a follow-up Plan after PlanQueue reports the completed plan has no remaining steps.
